zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国队 4:1 击败巴拉圭
zh-CN.headlineView: 这场胜利赢下的不只是比分，更打出了东道主的气势
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国队 4:1 击败巴拉圭；这场胜利赢下的不只是比分，更打出了东道主的气势
zh-CN.intro: 美国队以 4:1 开启世界杯征程，巴洛贡梅开二度，进攻效率和比赛强度都给人留下深刻印象。比分只是结果，更值得关注的是球队展现出的自信、侵略性和主场动能，一场揭幕战已经提前改变了外界对东道主竞争力的判断。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 开局的气势，会影响整届赛事的叙事。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 世界杯不只记录比分，也放大全球情绪。

en-US.headlineView: the hosts won more than three points; they announced their ambition
en-US.headlineFull: USA beat Paraguay 4-1; the hosts won more than three points, they announced their ambition
en-US.intro: The United States opened its World Cup campaign with a 4-1 win as Folarin Balogun scored twice. Beyond the score, the performance carried confidence, aggression and home momentum. One emphatic opening match has already changed how the wider field may judge the hosts.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Opening momentum can shape an entire tournament.
en-US.doudouQuote: Wait for full time before writing legends.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The World Cup records scores and amplifies global emotion.

zh-CN.headlineFact: SpaceX 走向公开资本市场
zh-CN.headlineView: 火箭负责制造想象，估值最终仍要接受市场检验
zh-CN.headlineFull: SpaceX 走向公开资本市场；火箭负责制造想象，估值最终仍要接受市场检验
zh-CN.intro: SpaceX 已向美国证券监管机构提交 IPO 注册文件，商业航天巨头开始接受公开市场对收入、成本、风险与治理的全面审视。太空故事足够宏大，但资本最终购买的不是浪漫，而是可持续现金流、增长空间和经得起质询的定价逻辑。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 伟大愿景也需要财务坐标。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 火箭能上天，估值未必能。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 资本市场会把想象力翻译成数字。

en-US.headlineFact: SpaceX moves into public capital markets
en-US.headlineView: rockets create imagination, but valuation must face the market
en-US.headlineFull: SpaceX moves into public capital markets; rockets create imagination, but valuation must face the market
en-US.intro: SpaceX has filed an IPO registration statement with U.S. regulators, opening the company to public scrutiny of revenue, cost, risk and governance. The space story is enormous, but investors ultimately buy sustainable cash flow, credible growth and a valuation that survives examination.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Great visions still need financial coordinates.
en-US.doudouQuote: Rockets can fly; valuations may not.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Public markets translate imagination into numbers.

zh-CN.headlineFact: Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 访问暂停
zh-CN.headlineView: 模型能力越强，规则与边界就越无法回避
zh-CN.headlineFull: Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 访问暂停；模型能力越强，规则与边界就越无法回避
zh-CN.intro: Anthropic 表示，在美国政府出口管制指令下，公司必须暂停外国用户对 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的访问。事件提醒行业：前沿模型竞争已不只是性能竞赛，国家安全、人员身份、跨境服务和监管权力正在共同决定技术究竟能被谁使用。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 技术边界正在被制度重新划线。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 最强模型，也绕不过一纸规则。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 能力越接近基础设施，治理越无法缺席。

en-US.headlineFact: Access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 is suspended
en-US.headlineView: stronger models make rules and boundaries impossible to avoid
en-US.headlineFull: Access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 is suspended; stronger models make rules and boundaries impossible to avoid
en-US.intro: Anthropic says a U.S. export-control directive forced it to suspend foreign-national access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5. The episode shows that frontier AI is no longer only a performance race: security policy, identity, cross-border service and regulatory power increasingly determine who can use advanced systems.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Institutions are redrawing the technology boundary.
en-US.doudouQuote: Even the strongest model cannot jailbreak a government order.
en-US.footerTakeaway: As capability becomes infrastructure, governance cannot stay absent.

zh-CN.headlineFact: Apple Intelligence 继续进化，Siri AI 进入新阶段
zh-CN.headlineView: 真正的智能不是更吵，而是更懂你
zh-CN.headlineFull: Apple Intelligence 继续进化，Siri AI 进入新阶段；真正的智能不是更吵，而是更懂你
zh-CN.intro: 苹果在 WWDC 预览新一代 Apple Intelligence 与重新设计的 Siri AI，强调更强的上下文理解、跨应用协作和隐私架构。竞争焦点正从“谁回答得更像人”转向“谁能在不打扰用户的前提下，真正理解意图并完成日常任务”。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 好的智能，应当降低人的认知负担。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 别只会聊天，先把事办了。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 个人 AI 的终点，是可靠地理解与行动。

en-US.headlineFact: Apple Intelligence evolves as Siri AI enters a new phase
en-US.headlineView: real intelligence is not louder, but more understanding
en-US.headlineFull: Apple Intelligence evolves as Siri AI enters a new phase; real intelligence is not louder, but more understanding
en-US.intro: Apple previewed its next generation of Apple Intelligence and a redesigned Siri AI, emphasizing context, cross-app action and privacy. The contest is shifting from who sounds most human to who can understand intent and complete everyday work without becoming another source of friction.
en-US.doudouQuote: Enough chatting. Get the task done.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Personal AI succeeds through reliable understanding and action.

sources.title: Next generation Apple Intelligence and Siri AI

zh-CN.headlineFact: Siri AI 因欧盟监管延后上线
zh-CN.headlineView: 技术跑得再快，也绕不过合规这道门
zh-CN.headlineFull: Siri AI 因欧盟监管延后上线；技术跑得再快，也绕不过合规这道门
zh-CN.intro: 苹果确认，受《数字市场法案》要求影响，Siri AI 无法随 iOS 27 与 iPadOS 27 在欧盟同步推出。事件把创新与竞争规则的冲突摆上台面：平台需要开放，智能助手又依赖深度系统权限，如何兼顾公平、安全与体验成为真正难题。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 合规不是终点，而是产品设计的一部分。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 全球产品必须从第一天就理解不同制度。

en-US.headlineFact: Siri AI is delayed in the EU
en-US.headlineView: even fast technology cannot bypass compliance
en-US.headlineFull: Siri AI is delayed in the EU; even fast technology cannot bypass compliance
en-US.intro: Apple says the Digital Markets Act will prevent Siri AI from launching with iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 in the EU. The conflict is structural: regulators want platform openness, while advanced assistants depend on deep system access. Fairness, security and product quality now have to be designed together.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Compliance is part of product design.
en-US.doudouQuote: Speed is useless when the gate is closed.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Global products must understand different institutions from day one.

sources.title: Siri AI delayed in EU due to DMA

zh-CN.headlineFact: G7 峰会将聚焦经济、安全与 AI
zh-CN.headlineView: 桌上谈的是合作，桌下比的仍是筹码
zh-CN.headlineFull: G7 峰会将聚焦经济、安全与 AI；桌上谈的是合作，桌下比的仍是筹码
zh-CN.intro: 法国将在埃维昂主持 G7 领导人峰会，全球经济失衡、供应链安全、人工智能和国际冲突将成为核心议题。峰会强调协调，但各国面对的通胀、产业政策与地缘压力并不相同，最终成果取决于共同声明之外能交换多少真实利益。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 多边合作的价值，要看承诺能否执行。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 合影都很整齐，利益从不排队。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 峰会的含金量，藏在会后行动里。

en-US.headlineFact: The G7 will focus on the economy, security and AI
en-US.headlineView: cooperation is on the table, leverage remains underneath
en-US.headlineFull: The G7 will focus on the economy, security and AI; cooperation is on the table, leverage remains underneath
en-US.intro: France will host G7 leaders in Evian with global imbalances, supply-chain security, artificial intelligence and international conflict high on the agenda. Coordination is the stated goal, but members face different domestic and geopolitical pressures. The test is what survives beyond the communiqué.
en-US.doudouQuote: The photo is orderly. Interests never are.
en-US.footerTakeaway: A summit is measured by what happens after it ends.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 联合国海洋评估再次发出警报
zh-CN.headlineView: 海洋不是遥远的风景，而是人类共同的生命线
zh-CN.headlineFull: 联合国海洋评估再次发出警报；海洋不是遥远的风景，而是人类共同的生命线
zh-CN.intro: 联合国第三次世界海洋评估指出，气候变化、过度捕捞、污染与生物多样性下降正让海洋承受持续加速的压力。海洋调节气候、提供食物并支撑亿万人生计，它的变化并不遥远，而会通过天气、经济和公共健康回到每个人身边。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 保护海洋，就是保护陆地上的生活。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 看不见海底，不等于问题不存在。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 共同海洋需要共同承担责任。

en-US.headlineFact: The UN ocean assessment issues another warning
en-US.headlineView: the ocean is not distant scenery, but humanity's shared lifeline
en-US.headlineFull: The UN ocean assessment issues another warning; the ocean is not distant scenery, but humanity's shared lifeline
en-US.intro: The UN's Third World Ocean Assessment says climate change, overfishing, pollution and biodiversity loss are placing accelerating pressure on the ocean. The ocean regulates climate, supplies food and supports billions of livelihoods. Its decline returns to everyone through weather, economics and health.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Protecting the ocean protects life on land.
en-US.doudouQuote: Invisible underwater does not mean nonexistent.
en-US.footerTakeaway: A shared ocean demands shared responsibility.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 24 颗星链卫星奔赴近地轨道
zh-CN.headlineView: 每一次发射，都在重写世界的连接方式
zh-CN.headlineFull: 24 颗星链卫星奔赴近地轨道；每一次发射，都在重写世界的连接方式
zh-CN.intro: SpaceX 使用猎鹰 9 号将 24 颗星链卫星送入近地轨道，一级助推器再次完成海上回收。高频发射正在扩大卫星互联网覆盖，也同步放大轨道拥堵、天文观测和空间治理问题。连接更多地方的同时，人类也必须学习管理共同轨道。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 连接能力越强，共同责任越大。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 轨道基础设施正在重画地球通信地图。

en-US.headlineFact: Twenty-four Starlink satellites head to low Earth orbit
en-US.headlineView: every launch rewrites how the world connects
en-US.headlineFull: Twenty-four Starlink satellites head to low Earth orbit; every launch rewrites how the world connects
en-US.intro: SpaceX launched 24 Starlink satellites to low Earth orbit and recovered the Falcon 9 first stage at sea. Rapid launch cadence expands satellite internet coverage while intensifying questions about congestion, astronomy and space governance. Better connection also demands better management of shared orbit.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Greater connection creates greater shared responsibility.
en-US.doudouQuote: Orbit is not an infinite car park.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Orbital infrastructure is redrawing Earth's communications map.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 龙飞船计划离站返航并带回科研样本
zh-CN.headlineView: 真正落地的不只是飞船，更是下一步探索的答案
zh-CN.headlineFull: 龙飞船计划离站返航并带回科研样本；真正落地的不只是飞船，更是下一步探索的答案
zh-CN.intro: NASA 计划于 6 月 16 日安排 SpaceX 第 34 次货运龙飞船离开国际空间站，返回地球并带回对时间敏感的科研样本与设备。返航不是任务尾声，样本进入实验室后产生的数据，才会转化为长期太空生活与地面医学的新知识。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 探索的价值，最终要回到可验证的答案。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 飞得高很酷，带回结果才算交作业。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 太空实验的下一站，是地球实验室。

en-US.headlineFact: Dragon is scheduled to return with research samples
en-US.headlineView: what lands is not only a spacecraft, but answers for the next mission
en-US.headlineFull: Dragon is scheduled to return with research samples; what lands is not only a spacecraft, but answers for the next mission
en-US.intro: NASA plans for SpaceX's 34th cargo Dragon to leave the International Space Station on June 16 carrying time-sensitive research samples and hardware. Return is not the end of the mission: laboratory analysis on Earth turns orbital experiments into knowledge for long-duration spaceflight and medicine.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Exploration gains value through verifiable answers.
en-US.doudouQuote: Flying high is cool. Bringing results home completes the assignment.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The next stop for orbital science is an Earth laboratory.
